channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: This Frankenstein AI Merges Claude Opus, GLM and Qwen—And Outperforms Top Models
item.description: Kyle Hessling stacked two of Jackrong's Qwopus finetunes into a single frankenmerge'—and then had to heal it. The result outperforms some of the top models.

item.title: Bitcoin slides toward $75,000 as Warsh says Trump didn't demand he cut rates
item.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq gave back their early morning gains alongside BTC as markets digested the Fed Chair nominee's Senate confirmation hearing.

item.title: New York Sues Coinbase and Gemini Over Prediction Markets, Seeking Billions in Damages
item.description: "Gemini and Coinbase’s so-called prediction markets are just illegal gambling operations," alleged New York AG Letitia James.

item.title: Kalshi takes on Coinbase, Robinhood with new plan to offer crypto perpetual futures: The Information
item.description: Prediction market platform Kalshi is moving onto Coinbase’s turf by launching crypto perpetual futures, aiming to capture the massive demand for digital asset derivatives within a regulated U.S. framework.

item.title: Dogecoin Foundation, MoonPay Team to Donate 1 Million DOGE to Dog Charity
item.description: Crypto payments firm MoonPay enabled contributions to dog welfare programs, marking a practical use case for Dogecoin.

item.title: Quantum Computers Could Boost AI by Processing Large Datasets More Efficiently
item.description: In a new study, researchers describe a method that feeds data into quantum computers in smaller batches instead of storing entire datasets.

item.title: Revolut targets a $200 billion IPO just months after its $75 billion share sale
item.description: The crypto-friendly fintech is planning its initial public offering (IPO) no sooner than 2028, according to an FT report.

item.title: Bitcoin price rally 'in progress' but upside could be capped at $84K
item.description: Analysts say Bitcoin’s rally has begun, but the upside may be capped at an average spot BTC ETF cost basis near $84,000.

item.title: Core Scientific plans $3.3B debt raise to fund AI data center push
item.description: The miner plans to refinance short-term debt and scale its US infrastructure as the broader industry pivots toward AI and high-performance computing.

item.title: Bitcoin funding stays negative at $78K as short squeeze expectations grow
item.description: BTC price action slowly headed upward but funding stayed negative, a unique occurrence that analysis said would result in a short squeeze.

item.title: Fed chair nominee pressed on potential conflicts of interest, independence
item.description: Kevin Warsh faced intense questions from Senator Elizabeth Warren and other lawmakers over his more than $100 million financial disclosure ahead of a confirmation hearing.

item.title: Bitcoin regains $76K as Coinbase-driven demand sustains recovery
item.description: A $517 million rise in spot volume led by Coinbase is helping Bitcoin reclaim $76,000, with steady inflows absorbing the weekend selling pressure.

item.title: Amazon Will Invest Up to $25 Billion More in Anthropic as AI Demand Surges
item.description: Amazon secures Anthropic as a major cloud customer through 2036 in one of the largest AI infrastructure alliances to date.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Fed Chair nominee Kevin Warsh says crypto is now part of the US financial system. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5XcWNfTnZ5V25CZE9lY2llNWpLcmZud0NWNW8wbmhNeUk4bG9XLWtQcFp5UWRiVEhvcEdQSEVETm9nSFVuV2xNVXl6cXpzTmk5cE5qRV93SGVOS1otLS00WEZB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Fed Chair nominee Ke…

item.title: DoorDash to Pay Delivery Workers in Stablecoins via Stripe's Tempo Blockchain
item.description: Delivery firm DoorDash will use Stripe's payments-focused blockchain, Tempo, to pay its Dashers in stablecoins in more than 40 countries.

item.title: Aave’s core markets hit 100% utilization at once, and that's not a good thing
item.description: CertiK says the lending protocol is in serious trouble while CEO Stani Kulechov tells CoinDesk he does “not have anything useful to say.”

item.title: AI slop has created a search problem crypto companies can’t ignore
item.description: Rechler argues that if these companies don’t adopt better content strategies and overly misuse AI-generated tools, their platforms, exchanges or dapps won’t be discovered via search.

item.title: Bitget exchange brings pre-IPO tokens to masses starting with SpaceX on Solana
item.description: The crypto exchange opens IPO Prime access with Republic to offer Solana-based tokens tied to private firms ahead of public listings.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 United States Indo-Pacific Commander, Admiral Samuel Paparo, advises the Senate that "Bitcoin shows incredible potential as a computer science tool." "Bitcoin is a reality, it is a valuable computer science tool as a power projection." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5sMGFPTExrUVBmU3dOMndmbGlWdUk1a1BUQTlpVW8tN3k0emEtQjdxWnJNVVBvcE5wZUppZkJwVTRmSmpQNkJMaFEyQ0RYN1NjRWE1eExzazB3MnlxSjVjQ2I0dVY0d28?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 United States…

item.title: Coinbase advisory board says quantum computing threat is on the horizon, crypto needs a plan
item.description: The 50-page paper concludes that while today’s blockchains remain secure, a future “fault-tolerant quantum computer” capable of breaking widely used encryption is increasingly plausible, and preparation must begin now.

item.title: Poland stalls on crypto law, forcing local companies to move abroad
item.description: Poland’s parliament is in a deadlock over crypto and its inability to align local laws with MiCA may drive some local crypto companies abroad.

item.title: European investors may switch banks for better crypto access, survey finds
item.description: A survey by Börse Stuttgart Digital shows that 35% of European investors would switch to banks with better crypto offerings, but regulatory uncertainty remains an issue.

item.title: Fake delivery driver targets French crypto worker in armed home invasion
item.description: A thwarted home invasion near Montpellier adds to France’s surge in violent “wrench attacks,” as high‑profile and doxxed crypto holders are increasingly in criminals’ sights.

item.title: Cut the red tape: 39 financial giants demand an emergency fast-track for Europe's blockchain pilot
item.description: The firms requested separating the DLT pilot regime from a larger package of 18 financial laws to allow for quicker updates and build real markets.

item.title: 🚨 BREAKING: INDOPACOM COMMANDER ADMIRAL PAPARO TELLSENATE ARMED SERVICES: "BITCOIN IS A VALUABLE COMPUTER SCIENCE TOOL AS POWER PROJECTION" AND THAT "BITCOIN IS A REALITY, A PEER-TO-PEER, ZERO TRUST T - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFB5THFQMUNjSGJqcG5NdUdzdWtiTk0xMUtTN0xZTldrT2djN0lSQkRmNFYwZGhuQ1MyX1hueWwxYko5RzZmamVCYzdtS2pjNmZLZ0ZSbk4yY0drVjU1dlE5WWxNUTNPNUE?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 BREAKING: INDOPACOM COMM…

item.title: Group of 39 firms urge EU to fast-track DLT rules, warn of lagging the US
item.description: A 39-member coalition including Nasdaq urged the EU to fast-track DLT pilot changes, warning Europe could lose ground to the US in tokenized finance.

item.title: UK invites crypto giant Bybit to London to win over some of UAE’s innovation shine
item.description: Bybit CEO Ben Zhou was invited to meetings in the U.K. this week with government-linked bodies including the FCA and House of Lords.

item.title: European banks are at risk of losing customers to rivals with better crypto tools
item.description: A new study found that while European investors find crypto complex, they are increasingly willing to switch banks to find a trusted partner that offers secure and regulated digital asset services.

item.title: DoorDash is bringing stablecoin payments to masses with Stripe-backed blockchain
item.description: The delivery service is working with the Stripe-led blockchain firm Tempo to bring stablecoin payouts to its global marketplace, replacing fragmented regional rails.

item.title: UK plans payments rule changes for stablecoins, tokenized deposits
item.description: The UK government plans a stablecoin and tokenization rules overhaul, appointing former FCA official Chris Woolard to support work on its digital markets strategy.

item.title: Block’s Cash App Launches Accounts for Young Kids—Without Bitcoin Access
item.description: Cash App joins the youth banking race with high-yield savings, but the managed kid accounts can’t tap into the app’s Bitcoin features.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin whales had their "largest weekly accumulation" since July 2025 last week, Bloomberg reports 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1kazlZdTNxeXhUQWJQT1NWNjgyTFQ2NGJEcGpucmhrMGs3Z1loT1NmUUYtUG9uSDRJTFRLck5WYVRSN3hKeURlLWk1dk5MNDFUR1ZKem0xQmxjNEpxV2Z6SHJ2X0lsQkE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin whales had…

item.title: Optimism Bills 'Privacy Boost' as Turning Point for Enterprises on Ethereum
item.description: The layer-2 Ethereum scaling network’s privacy offering is expected to expand to additional blockchains.

item.title: $BTC - BITCOIN WHALES ACCUMULATE AT FASTEST PACE IN A YEAR Bitcoin “whales” added about 45,000 BTC last week, the largest weekly accumulation since July 2025, according to Cex. IO. Whales—wallets holding 100 to 10,000 BTC—bought in sy - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5zeGw0a241czlpN2hhbmE3YWRqZFhzT2gyV2dnSm9Cblpldk1Td3lTVXZQVHVWS2xaajVuVGdsNU96dGgwUXZsTHYyMmRzSV9EOFJ2NHRUQ1pUend4Tmc?oc=5" target="_blank">$BTC - BITCOIN WHALES ACCUMULATE AT FAS…

item.title: South Korea tax agency opens bidding for crypto tracing tool
item.description: South Korea's tax authority is looking to build crypto transaction tracking software that can help track potential tax evaders.

item.title: Crypto hackers stole $17B over past 10 years: DefiLlama
item.description: Private key compromises led crypto hack losses over the past decade as recent DeFi exploits show attackers moving beyond smart contract bugs.

item.title: Canton, ZKsync clash over how blockchains enforce rules
item.description: Matter Labs’ Alex Gluchowski says Canton isn’t a blockchain, while Digital Asset co-founders argue public chains aren’t that different.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) gains 3.3% while index moves lower
item.description: Aave (AAVE), up 1.9% from Monday, joined Stellar (XLM) as a top performer.

item.title: Bank of Korea's New Governor Prioritizes CBDCs Over Stablecoins in First Policy Address
item.description: The central bank chief outlined digital finance priorities while legislative debates continue over private stablecoin frameworks.

item.title: XRP holders back in profit as price eyes potential 55% breakout
item.description: Most XRP investors are back in profit, increasing the chance for a rally to $2.24, but bulls must first hold the price above $1.40.

item.title: Iran Scammers Demand Bitcoin, USDT for Transit Through Strait of Hormuz: Report
item.description: Fake crypto clearance demands are targeting ships stranded at Hormuz as the Iran conflict enters its third month.

item.title: VIX drops 45% in three weeks: Is Bitcoin price ready to retake $80K?
item.description: A falling VIX signals improving risk appetite, boosting Bitcoin’s chances of attracting fresh demand and breaking above the $80,000 level.

item.title: Morning Minute: Saylor's $2.54B Buy Buoys Bitcoin
item.description: Michael Saylor and Tom Lee continued to buy BTC and ETH in big size, while Aave published its incident report from the KelpDAO exploit.

item.title: BitMEX taps Zodia Custody for off-exchange collateral trading
item.description: BitMEX has partnered with Zodia Custody to enable institutional crypto derivatives trading via off-exchange collateral held in segregated custody.

item.title: Almost 80% of Japan's institutional investors plan to buy crypto within 3 years, survey finds
item.description: A survey by Nomura reveals that roughly 80% of Japan's investment professionals plan to allocate up to 5% of their portfolios to digital assets by 2029.

item.title: Bitcoin trades above a make-or-break level ahead of Warsh hearing
item.description: What you need to know for April 21, 2026

item.title: Grandson of Mob Boss John Gotti Sentenced for Funneling Stolen COVID Funds Into Crypto
item.description: The grandson of Gambino crime boss John Gotti pleaded guilty to wire fraud after funneling $420K in stolen pandemic relief funds into crypto.

item.title: Kelp DAO attacker moves $175M in Ether after exploit: Arkham
item.description: The Kelp DAO attacker has moved $175 million of stolen Ether in an apparent bid to start laundering it after the $290 million exploit.

item.title: Bitcoin Resistance at $78K and $83K Could Cap Rally: Schwab
item.description: The Schwab Center for Financial Research warned that Bitcoin faces key resistance between $78,000 and $83,000 investor cost basis levels.

item.title: Bitcoin climbs as risk sentiment improves, altcoins hit by exploit concerns
item.description: Bitcoin advanced while altcoins continued to struggle after the weekend's DeFi exploit, with markets eyeing Middle East tensions and shifting risk sentiment.

item.title: Tether( @tether) has minted 2B $USDT on #Ethereum over the past 3 days. intel.arkm.com/explorer/entit… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9WdmZvWnJxQ0dURGl6UVV2YWN3c0VEdmZkMEx6TU5mcl80X1dtUHBTLThXQW1iSVNuZ0ljTFJ3NnBIZ2JjaFFvVW5pSW9ucnNPVUszdVA1RXYxZTRrbTRTNFJR?oc=5" target="_blank">Tether( @tether) has minted 2B $US…

item.title: Crypto scammers offer ‘safe passage’ through Hormuz. At least one ship may have been conned.
item.description: Marisks, a maritime risk company, alerted ships stranded by the Hormuz blockade to scammers posing as Iranian authorities asking for bitcoin or USDT.

item.title: Bank of Korea’s new governor signals CBDC and bank token push, skips stablecoins in key address
item.description: The BOK will increase scrutiny of crypto markets and non-bank finance, and will also modernize currency markets for 24-hour foreign exchange trading, he said.

item.title: Arbitrum Security Council Freezes $71.5M in Ethereum Linked to $292M KelpDAO Exploit
item.description: Arbitrum's emergency response to the KelpDAO exploit has sparked praise and criticism over the network's ability to freeze stolen assets.

item.title: Scammers demand crypto from stranded ships in Strait of Hormuz: Report
item.description: Shipping companies with vessels stranded near the Strait of Hormuz are being targeted by scammers posing as Iranian authorities, demanding Bitcoin or USDt for safe passage.

item.title: Strategy overtakes BlackRock IBIT in bitcoin holdings after bear market buying
item.description: Leveraged accumulation and new capital tools push MSTR ahead of the world’s largest spot bitcoin ETF.

item.title: Bitcoin is now calmer than South Korea's stock market. Here's why it matters
item.description: Bitcoin's comparative stability during geopolitical turmoil has reinforced its appeal as a hedge.

item.title: Philippines SEC flags dYdX, six crypto platforms as unauthorized
item.description: Promoters of flagged platforms may face fines of up to 5 million Philippine pesos ($89,000) or up to 21 years in prison under Philippine securities law.

item.title: KelpDAO hackers are laundering millions in stolen crypto, data show
item.description: KelpDAO hackers are moving $290M in stolen crypto across blockchains, using privacy tools to mask the trail as DeFi contagion fears move through the sector.
